seo.description: Image processing utilities, cross-platform apps, logging tools, and other open-source projects.

props.title: Tools
paragraphs: Desktop utilities for texture workflows and compression prep, plus cross-platform apps, logging libraries, and other open-source projects.

cards.title: Web Portfolio Builder
cards.description: Desktop app for editing portfolio and studio sites — build static pages and preview locally before publishing.

cards.title: SOCKS Proxy
cards.description: Minimal macOS app to manage SSH SOCKS proxy connections with health checks and auto-reconnect.

cards.title: Similar Textures Finder
cards.description: Desktop app for finding duplicate and near-duplicate texture images.

cards.title: Crunch Textures
cards.description: Check and resize textures for Crunch compression (width/height multiple of 4).

cards.title: Log Keeper
cards.description: Cross-platform log snapshot sharing (Flutter/Dart, Bloc, Firebase Firestore).

cards.title: proviso
cards.description: Flutter toolkit for conditional rendering, subtree wrapping, and handy dev shortcuts.
